prompt_text:
### Demographics: 35-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 1 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Normal
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~18.8 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 15units once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 48.1 kg; Height 150.7 cm; BMI 21.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 122/79 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.5%; 9 months ago 10.0%; 6 months ago 10.0%; 3 months ago 9.6%; current 9.6%), FPG (12 months ago 240mg/dL; 9 months ago 216mg/dL; 6 months ago 286mg/dL; 3 months ago 206mg/dL; current 208mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 50.2kg; 9 months ago 46.8kg; 6 months ago 46.9kg; 3 months ago 49.7kg; current 48.1kg), Height (12 months ago 150.7cm; 9 months ago 150.7cm; 6 months ago 150.7cm; 3 months ago 150.7cm; current 150.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 22.0kg/m²; current 21.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 122mmHg; 9 months ago 121mmHg; 6 months ago 123mmHg; 3 months ago 121mmHg; current 122mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 79mmHg; 9 months ago 79mmHg; 6 months ago 80mmHg; 3 months ago 80mmHg; current 79mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 24U/L; 9 months ago 24U/L; 6 months ago 25U/L; 3 months ago 24U/L; current 28U/L), AST (12 months ago 23U/L; 9 months ago 24U/L; 6 months ago 16U/L; 3 months ago 16U/L; current 20U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.3mg/dL; current 0.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 14mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 10mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; current 8mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 151mg/g; 9 months ago 122mg/g; 6 months ago 190mg/g; 3 months ago 149mg/g; current 198mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 79mg/dL; 9 months ago 83mg/dL; 6 months ago 86mg/dL; 3 months ago 79mg/dL; current 82mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 58mg/dL; 9 months ago 57mg/dL; 6 months ago 61mg/dL; 3 months ago 61mg/dL; current 59mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 89mg/dL; 9 months ago 96mg/dL; 6 months ago 107mg/dL; 3 months ago 106mg/dL; current 101mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 11.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.68 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
